slides.title: More videos beats better videos
slides.subtitle: On TikTok Shop, at-bats win. Here's why volume outsells polish.

slides.title: Every video is a fresh audition
slides.body: TikTok tests each post on a small new audience. Nothing you did before carries over.

slides.label: of sales come from a few breakout videos
slides.body: You can't predict which ones. More posts = more shots at a breakout.

slides.title: Done beats perfect
slides.body: A rough video today outsells a polished one next week. Production value has steep diminishing returns.

slides.title: Batch, post, double down
slides.body: Film 10 in one sitting. Post 3-5 a day. Then pour budget into the ones that pop.

slides.title: Want the posting system?
slides.body: Comment the keyword and I'll send you the guide.
